zh.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特
zh.Cavendish, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可卡文迪什
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pelham, Knt.於大約1388年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Sir John Pelham35歲，母親Alice Crownall33歲。他於大約1424年與Joan Courcy結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1450年在法國被列為sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france 。他去世於1457年5月20日之後在英國素可勞頓，埋葬在英國素可瓦布萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Pelham, Knt.于大约1388年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Sir John Pelham35岁，母亲Alice Crownall33岁。他于大约1424年与Joan Courcy结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1450年在法国被列为sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france 。他去世于1457年5月20日之后在英国素可勞頓，埋葬在英国素可瓦布萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pelham, Knt. was born about 1388, in Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Pelham, was 35 and his mother, Alice Crownall, was 33. He married Joan Courcy about 1424. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1450, his occupation is listed as sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france  in France. He died after 20 May 1457, in Laughton, Sussex, England, and was buried in Warbleton, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pelham, Knt. est né environ 1388, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pelham, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Crownall, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan Courcy environ 1424. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1450, sa profession de son indiquée est sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france  à France. Il est décédé après 20 mai 1457, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Warbleton, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Pelham, Knt. um 1388 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Pelham 35 und seine Mutter Alice Crownall 33. Er hat um 1424 Joan Courcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1450 ist sein Beruf als sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france  in Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb nach 20. Mai 1457 in Laughton, Sussex, England und wurde in Warbleton, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pelham, Knt. è nato il circa 1388 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Pelham, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alice Crownall, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan Courcy circa 1424. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1450, la sua occupazione è indicata come sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france  nel Francia. Morì dopo il 20 maggio 1457, nel Laughton, Sussex, England, e fu sepolto a Warbleton, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pelham, Knt.が約1388年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir John Pelhamは35歳，母Alice Crownallは33歳であった。約1424年にJoan Courcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1450年，フランスでの職業はsir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france と記録されている。彼は1457年5月20日以後にイギリススセックスラウトンで死去し，イギリススセックスワーブレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pelham, Knt.(이)가 대략 1388년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Pelham(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Crownall(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1424년 Joan Courcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1450년, 그의 직업은 프랑스에서 sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france 이었다. 그는 1457년 5월 20일 이후 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 워블레턴에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1388–after 20 May 1457: ойролцоогоор 1388 он–1457 оны Тавдугаар сарын 20–наас хойш
mn.Cavendish, Suffolk, England: Cavendish, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pelham, Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1388, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Pelham, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Crownall, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Courcy aproximadamente 1424. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1450, sua profissão aparece como sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france  em França. Ele faleceu após 20 de maio de 1457, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Pelham, Knt. родился около 1388 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Pelham было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Crownall, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Courcy около 1424 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1450 году он работал по профессии sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france  в местности Франция. Он умер после 20 май 1457 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности варблетон, суссекс, Англия.

sm.about 1388–after 20 May 1457: e tusa o le 1388–ina ua ma'ea le 20 Me 1457
sm.from 1450 to 1459: mai le 1450 e o'o I le 1459

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Pelham, Knt. nació aproximadamente 1388, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Pelham, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Crownall, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan Courcy aproximadamente 1424. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1450, su ocupación registrada era sir john pelham, chamberlain to queen katherine of france  en Francia. Murió después de 20 de mayo de 1457, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra.
